_publications._publicationTitle: Microarray analyses reveal regional astrocyte heterogeneity with implications for neurofibromatosis type 1 (NF1)-regulated glial proliferation.

_contextSnippet: we observed increased numbers of Ki-67-immunoreactive cells in CB, BS and ON of Nf1 CKO mice, but not in the CTX
details: Increased numbers of Ki-67-immunoreactive cells in cerebellum, brainstem and optic nerve, but not in cortex
